title: group_sets.tsv row — LABELS over WHO
description: One group-label table for a sample set. Carries family / population / batch / karyotype assignments. FK: group_set → sample_set.

path.description: Path to the groups TSV (sample_id + group columns).

group_columns.description: Comma-separated list of group columns in the file (e.g. 'family,population,batch').
